name: Sissy-High
description: At your high-school, Sissy-High, you're just your regular run-of-the-mill loser who doesn't seem to fit in with anyone. That doesn't mean you haven't tried. Who knows, maybe the perfect group of friends is waiting for you. Or maybe they're just looking to have some fun. The only way to find out is to go and say hi...
creator: Whelanie
